title: Phase 32 — Million-Visitor Probability Sprint: Final Report
summary: Built a complete zero-budget search-demand factory. 19 planning files across all systems. Ready for Day 2 execution (page generation).

1_math_model.key_finding: 10-20% probability of 1M in 6 months. Requires flawless execution + domain authority growth. Scenario E (Hybrid Tiered) recommended.

2_head_term_avoidance.key_finding: 11 head terms blocked as 6-month targets. Attack long-tail instead.

3_databases.key_finding: 6 databases, ~20,000 possible pages. 1M-5M estimated impressions at scale.

4_quality_rules.key_finding: 85/100 minimum score. 6-category rubric. Below 85 = noindex or don't publish.

5_demand_validation.key_finding: 8 allowed demand sources. Minimum score 7/20. No evidence = no page.

6_production_limits.key_finding: Week 1: 10/day. Week 2: 20/day. Week 3-4: 30/day. Month 2: 50/day max. All conditional on positive metrics.

7_page_template.key_finding: Answer pages not blogs. H1 = exact query. Answer first, then explanation. Full worked example + FAQ + internal links.

8_test_batch.key_finding: 40 loan + 30 mortgage + 15 compound + 15 debt. Batch 1 (25 loan) specified page-by-page.

9_data_assets.key_finding: 6 data assets planned for weeks 1-6. Each with HTML table + CSV + methodology + journalist summary.

10_distribution.key_finding: 9 allowed channels (RSS, sitemap, Pinterest cautious, IndexNow, Bing, GitHub CSVs). 8 blocked channels (spam, paid, bots).

11_data_hub.key_finding: /data hub with 5 categories. Each with tables + CSV + methodology + cite section. No signup.

12_ai_answer.key_finding: 9 required elements per page for AI snippet optimization. Forbidden manipulative text list.

13_ctr_attack.key_finding: 6 candidate pages identified. Max 3/day. Don't give answer away in snippet.

14_ad_readiness.key_finding: 15-point checklist. Multiple warnings: thin content, mobile perf, near-duplicate risk at scale.

15_milestones.key_finding: Month 1: prove indexing + first click. Month 3: 50K+ impressions, 500+ clicks. Month 5: 100K+ visits required.

16_kill_rules.key_finding: 7 kill conditions, 6 double-down signals. Zero tolerance for unvalidated pages.

17_daily_workflow.key_finding: 13-step daily loop. Replaces Phase 31 SAFE_RECOVERY cron. Report with actual metrics.

18_first_7_days.key_finding: Day 1 = DONE (planning). Day 2-5 = build 100 pages. Day 6 = data hub. Day 7 = scale decision.

success_conditions.phase_32_succeeds_if: Creates a controlled, quality-first system that can scale into thousands of useful finance answer pages and data assets without spam, paid links, or manual dependency.
success_conditions.first_milestone: First 100 pages index at 40%+ within 21 days. First content click achieved.
success_conditions.scale_condition: Winning database identified. Any impressions turning into clicks.
success_conditions.ultimate_goal: Make 1M monthly visitors in 6 months more probable. Current probability: ~10-20% with flawless execution.

current_state.cron: Phase 31 SAFE_RECOVERY still active. Will be replaced by Phase 32 daily workflow.
current_state.risks_blocked: All prohibited actions blocked by system rules

on_track_off_track: OFF_TRACK (Phase 31 baseline: 0 clicks, 503 discovered-not-indexed). Phase 32 systems now built to change trajectory.
next_action: Day 2 (Jun 19): Build first 25 loan payment pages with quality >= 85 and demand validation. Do NOT deploy until all checks pass.
